metadata.label: In Memory Vector Store
metadata.description: An in-memory vector store implementation that provides simple storage for vector entries.

metadata.label: Milvus Vector Store
metadata.description:
Milvus Vector Store implementation with support for Dense, Sparse, and Hybrid vector search modes.

This class implements the ai:VectorStore interface and integrates with the Milvus vector database
to provide functionality for vector upsert, query, and deletion.

metadata.label: Pgvector Vector Store
metadata.description:
Pgvector Vector Store implementation with support for Dense, Sparse, and Hybrid vector search modes.

This class implements the ai:VectorStore interface and integrates with the Pgvector vector database
to provide functionality for vector upsert, query, and deletion.

metadata.label: Pinecone Vector Store
metadata.description:
Pinecone Vector Store implementation with support for Dense, Sparse, and Hybrid vector search modes.

This class implements the ai:VectorStore interface and integrates with the Pinecone vector database
to provide functionality for vector upsert, query, and deletion.

- pineconeClient: Underlying client used to communicate with Pinecone
- queryMode: The search mode (DENSE, SPARSE, or HYBRID)
- namespace: Optional namespace to isolate vectors within Pinecone
- filters: Metadata filters applied during search
- similarityTopK: Number of top similar vectors to return in queries
- id: Unique identifier for the vector store instance

metadata.label: Weaviate Vector Store
metadata.description:

This class implements the ai:VectorStore interface and integrates with the Weaviate vector database
